title: SUMMARY OF THE GRAPHICAL PROCEDURE
summary: This page concludes the graphical interpretation of convolution for negative time shifts and notes when the signals do not overlap, making the convolution zero. It then summarizes the step-by-step graphical convolution procedure and introduces a humorous figure emphasizing that convolution is less intimidating than it first appears.

figures.caption: Cartoon illustration about convolution with protesting students and dean of engineering; caption reads "Convolution: Its bark is worse than its bite!"
